task_id.description: Unique GHSA-level task identifier. Format: ecvebench-{project}-{n}. Difficulty is a runtime parameter, not part of the task id.

ecosystem.description: Package ecosystem (e.g. npm, pip, maven, go, composer, rust, nuget, rubygems)

commit.description: Full 40-character pre-patch SHA served to the agent

hints.description: Map of difficulty level to the hint shown at that level. The harness projects exactly one of these into the agent input at runtime.

L0.description: L0 is pure discovery; no hint is shown.

L1.description: Vague localization hint pointing at a broad region of the codebase without revealing the vulnerability type or specific files/functions.

area.description: Broad codebase area where the vulnerability lives (e.g. 'authentication middleware', 'API request handling layer'). No file paths, function names, or vulnerability details.

L2.description: Scrubbed CVE description. Describes the vulnerability type, mechanism, and impact without revealing location.

description.description: Scrubbed vulnerability description. No file or function references.

L3.description: Targeted hint: a more specific localization area and a more specific CVE description than L1/L2. Narrows to ~3-5 files without naming exact paths or functions.

area.description: Targeted localization hint. More specific than L1 — may name the specific subsystem, module, or driver (e.g. 'SQLite database driver schema introspection') but not exact file paths or function names.

description.description: Targeted CVE description. More specific than L2 — may include distinguishing context from the advisory (e.g. technology, protocol, configuration) but not file paths, function names, or code snippets.

reason.description: Unscored. Human-readable explanation of the vulnerability.
